title: Clash
description: A simple modpack that aims (no pun intended) to bring a new era of PVP to Minecraft.
body:
# Clash: *Unleash the Battle Within*

Step into a world where combat is taken to new heights in *Clash*, a modpack designed for players who crave a richer, more dynamic fighting experience. Whether you're a warrior wielding new, powerful weapons or a tactical master mastering new combat techniques, *Clash* has something to offer.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Supports Minecraft 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e7fa69d211fb1b04be707532632b576e0fac3ce_0.webp)
![Supports Minecraft 1.21.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aae7293499c4fd58f799c748f24ee5177892a24d.png)
![Supports Minecraft 1.21.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf3f6c19aa9492b7b6d2a7cd2db54d0bf3cb8e7d_0.webp)

![Modrinth](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)  ![GitHub](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)

![FabricMC](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Key Features:

- **Expanded Weaponry and Armour**:  
  With mods like *[Additional Armoury](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-armoury)* and *[Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)*, wield everything from spears to chakrams, katanas to greathammers, each with unique stats and enchantments. The addition of *[MC Dungeons Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw)* and *[MC Dungeons Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcda)* brings iconic items from Minecraft Dungeons straight to your world.

- **Revolutionized Combat**:  
  Experience combat like never before with *[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)*, *[Combat Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-nouveau)*, and *[Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll)*. These mods provide new, fluid mechanics including parrying, riposting, and the ability to roll for quick escapes or offensive maneuvers. Dual wielding is brought to life with *[Dual Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/dual-swords)* and enhanced with combat-focused enchantments through *[Extended Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-enchanting)*.

- **Enhanced Gameplay Mechanics**:  
  Smooth your journey with the *[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)* for mod compatibility, *[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)* and *[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)* for performance optimizations, and *[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)* for memory management. The *[First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model)* mod gives you a fresh perspective, while *[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)* and *[playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)* bring fluid, immersive animations to both first- and third-person views.

- **Better Interaction and Immersion**:  
  Keep track of your enemies and friends with *[Provi's Health Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/provis-health-bars)*, or chat with fellow adventurers using *[Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)*. The inclusion of *[Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)* and *[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)* ensures a seamless, customizable experience for every player.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

<details>
<summary>Full List Of Mods</summary>

  - [**Additional Armoury**](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-armoury) - Adds more weapons, magic, and armour to the game. Part of the Combat+ collection.
- [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods.
- [**Better Combat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) - ⚔️ Easy, spectacular and fun melee combat system from Minecraft Dungeons.
- [**Chat Heads**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - See who you're chatting with!
- [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [**Combat Nouveau**](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-nouveau) - The future of Minecraft combat has arrived! Many tweaks to make your experience more enjoyable.
- [**Combat Roll**](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll) - 🧶 Adds combat roll ability, with related attributes and enchantments.
- [**Combat+ Core**](https://modrinth.com/mod/combatplus-core) - The core library and compatibility layer for the Combat+ series.
- [**Dual Swords**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dual-swords) - Parry, riposte, and dual wield in Minecraft. Part of the Combat+ collection.
- [**Extended Enchanting**](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-enchanting) - Adds many new enchantments, offering many new playstyles and options. Part of the Combat+ collection.
- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.
- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
- [**First-person Model**](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) - Enables the third-person Model in first-person
- [**Forge Config API Port**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - NeoForge's & Forge's config systems provided to other modding ecosystems. Designed for a multiloader architecture.
- [**Indium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo
- [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic optimization mod. Well suited for clients and servers of all kinds. Now available for Fabric and NeoForge!
- [**MC Dungeons Armors**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcda) - Bringing the armors of Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft
- [**MC Dungeons Weapons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw) - Adds the weapons, tools and weapon enchantments from Minecraft Dungeons
- [**Not Enough Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person
- [**Provi's Health Bars**](https://modrinth.com/mod/provis-health-bars) - Adds sleek and expansive health bars / damage indicators.
- [**Puzzles Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - Why's it called Puzzles you ask? That's the puzzle!
- [**Simply Swords**](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) - Adds Spears, Glaives, Chakrams, Katanas, Greathammer/axes, Rapiers, and many more weapons!
- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft. Now available for both NeoForge and Fabric!
- [**playerAnimator**](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) - animate the player

</details>



---

Prepare for epic battles, strategic play, and a ton of new mechanics that enhance your Minecraft world. Whether you're fighting off mobs, dueling other players, or delving into new dungeons, *Clash* will change how you play Minecraft forever.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
